questions.question: Insert five records into the 'Students' table with the following details: Student ID, Name, and Age. Assume the table has the following schema: 'Student ID' (int), 'Name' (varchar), 'Age' (int).
questions.hint: Use the correct SQL syntax to insert the records.

questions.question: Insert five records into the 'Employees' table with the following details: Employee ID, Name, Department, and Salary. Assume the table has the following schema: 'Employee ID' (int), 'Name' (varchar), 'Department' (varchar), 'Salary' (float).
questions.hint: Use the correct SQL syntax to insert the records.

questions.question: Insert five records into the 'Products' table with the following details: Product ID, Product Name, Price, and Stock. Assume the table has the following schema: 'Product ID' (int), 'Product Name' (varchar), 'Price' (float), 'Stock' (int).
questions.hint: Use the correct SQL syntax to insert the records.
